fixes.title: Improve mobile menu max-height calculation
fixes.description: Rewrote updateMenuMaxHeight() in HeaderMain.js with the precise formula: viewportHeight - rect.top - headerPadding - logoRowHeight - bottomSpacing. logoRow is queried dynamically via header.querySelector(':scope > .flex'). headerPadding is 32px (py-4 top+bottom). bottomSpacing reads --side-gutter from CSS (parseFloat of the computed value, falling back to 16). rect.top automatically accounts for admin bar, SEP CTA button, fixed offset, and scroll position. Result clamped to minimum 200px.
fixes.note: JS-only change. No TSX/PHP sync required.

fixes.title: Remove multiple:false from block.json files
fixes.description: Removed '"multiple": false' from the supports object in blocks/Header/block.json and blocks/Header/HeaderMain/block.json. Also fixed a trailing comma left in HeaderMain/block.json after the removal ("anchor": true, -> "anchor": true). Parent constraint on HeaderMain (parent: ["takt/header"]) and template system provide sufficient restriction.

fixes.title: Equalize logo-to-divider and divider-to-first-item spacing
fixes.description: Changed menu-open:pt-4 to menu-open:pt-8 in HeaderMain.php, and max-md:pt-4 to max-md:pt-8 in the isMenuOpen branch of HeaderMain.tsx. Both padding-top and gap-8 are now 32px, giving equal visual distance above and below the <hr> divider when the mobile menu is open.

validation.warningDetails: All warnings are in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs). The htmlStructureSync warning for HeaderMain is expected — TSX editor view intentionally differs from PHP frontend rendering.
